content: Phase 3 Bloom's Taxonomy Quiz: 8 questions (5 Understand/Apply, 3 Analyze/Evaluate). Covers: proxy security (ADR-0005), exception hierarchy, fallback chain, TOCTOU gap, stateless repository design, Environment testability, stale response handling, Phase 5 forward-compatibility. Includes 1 debug scenario (Q6: WiFi loss mid-session) and 1 change-impact (Q4: 429 rate limit trace). Pass threshold: 70% (6/8).

Quiz results: 100% (8/8) PASS. Breakdown: Understand 3/3, Apply 2/2, Analyze 2/2, Evaluate 1/1. Strengths: deep understanding of proxy security model, exception hierarchy design rationale, fallback chain tracing, TOCTOU debugging, stateless repository reasoning, and forward-compatibility analysis for Phase 5. No gaps identified. Developer demonstrates mastery across all Bloom levels for Phase 3 concepts.
